title: pholidota nervosa
intro: Pholidota nervosa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the nervous tree or Asiatic tree. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia, where it has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the nervous system. In traditional herbal medicine, Pholidota nervosa is typically prepared as a tea or decoction, and it is also used in folk remedies to treat various ailments, such as fever and digestive issues.
